title: AclEntry
description: An individual entry within an ACL, representing an IP address or CIDR range used for access control.

id.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the ACL entry.

acl_id.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the ACL.

ip.description: An IP address or CIDR range.

subnet.description: The CIDR subnet mask for IP ranges.

negated.description: Whether the entry is negated (0 = not negated, 1 = negated).

comment.description: A freeform descriptive note about the entry.

created_at.description: The date and time the entry was created.

updated_at.description: The date and time the entry was last updated.

deleted_at.description: The date and time the entry was deleted.
